attributes.additional_details: We believe meat and dairy ads hide the cruelty of factory farming behind misleading images of happy animals. Billions suffer each year in inhumane conditions while consumers are encouraged to support these industries. In our view banning these ads would promote compassion, encourage sustainable plant-based choices, and align advertising with ethical values. End the promotion of animal cruelty and support a kinder, healthier, and more honest future for animals, people, and the planet.
attributes.background: We think billions of animals suffer in factory farms while meat and dairy ads hide the cruelty. Ban meat and dairy ads to support humane, sustainable, plant-based choices. The less people see these advertisements, kinder choices can be made. Help to save animals lives by stopping advertisements.
